title: Design Premium Landing Page UI/UX
description:
Implement a state-of-the-art responsive landing page dashboard utilizing the following tokens:
  • Glassmorphism header navigation
  • Vibrant gradients for hero CTA
  • Interactive dark/light theme toggle transition

comments.author: Marcus Aurelius
comments.content: Make sure we focus heavily on the micro-animations for button hovers.

replies.author: Sophia V
replies.content: Agreed! I will define the HSL color shifts in our global variables stylesheet.

replies.author: Marcus Aurelius
replies.content: Awesome, that will make the theme transitions look ultra-smooth.

comments.author: Ethan Hunt
comments.content: The responsive grid has been tested on mobile views and it looks perfectly aligned.

title: Set up NgRx Store and Signal Selectors
description:
Configure the core state store for task operations. Ensure the following:
  • Use createReducer and action actions
  • Convert NgRx store selections into Angular Signals inside components
  • Persist state updates to localStorage

comments.author: Elena Rostova
comments.content: Should we use NgRx Effects for the mock API load?

replies.author: Marcus Aurelius
replies.content: Yes, we should load from public/tasks.json using Angular's HttpClient and pipe the response into loadTasksSuccess action.

title: Implement Nested Recursive Comments Component
description: Build a component that recursively calls itself to display unlimited nested comment replies. Use a recursive templates structure and style it to indent nicely at each level.
